step_by_step_reasoning: We first parse all entities from the World Model and assign unique node IDs. Then, we map the visual connections strictly according to the specified source and target endpoints, grouping them into two primary workflows: the online prediction path (flow_id 0) where ECS queries DynamoDB and invokes the SageMaker Model Endpoint, and the offline data preparation and model exploration path (flow_id 1) where EMR reads from S3 (Data Lake), writes to S3 (Prepared Dataset), and SageMaker Notebooks access the dataset for offline evaluation.

graph.name: Voodoo Mobile Game Ad Cross-Promotion ML Architecture
graph.notes: An AWS architecture optimized for cross-promoting and monentizing mobile applications using SageMaker. It includes an online serving stack built with ECS on EC2 backed by DynamoDB and SageMaker Model Endpoints, alongside an offline batch pipeline leveraging EMR for data preparation and SageMaker Notebooks for model evaluation.

nodes.name: ALB
nodes.notes: Application Load Balancer distributing incoming ad request traffic to the compute tier.

nodes.name: EC2
nodes.notes: EC2 instances acting as the host infrastructure for ECS containers in an Auto Scaling Group.

nodes.name: ECS
nodes.notes: ECS cluster executing business logic filters, querying user features, and calling SageMaker Model Endpoint.

nodes.name: SAGEMAKER
nodes.notes: Fully managed machine learning platform used to train and host models autonomously.

nodes.name: NOTEBOOK
nodes.notes: Jupyter Notebook instance for Data Scientists to explore data, test offline predictions, and build models.

nodes.name: MODEL ENDPOINT
nodes.notes: Real-time SageMaker hosted model endpoint processing millions of predictions daily for ad recommendations.

nodes.name: MODEL TRAINING
nodes.notes: SageMaker model training jobs for automated training processes.

nodes.name: DYNAMODB
nodes.notes: NoSQL database containing necessary features used by the ML model to perform real-time user-targeted recommendations.

nodes.name: S3 (Data Lake)
nodes.notes: Data lake S3 bucket holding raw logs and mobile interaction datasets.

nodes.name: EMR
nodes.notes: EMR clusters executing scheduled batch jobs to aggregate, join, and clean data lake inputs.

nodes.name: S3 (Prepared Dataset)
nodes.notes: Target S3 bucket storing prepared, aggregated datasets used for offline research and model training.

edges.notes: ECS queries DynamoDB to retrieve real-time user features required for machine learning model invocation.
ECS invokes the SageMaker Model Endpoint to obtain ad installation probability predictions.
EMR batch jobs read raw data from the S3 Data Lake.
EMR aggregates and writes the cleaned, processed training dataset back into S3.
Data scientists read the prepared datasets into SageMaker Notebooks for offline model training and validation.
